Recurring PEEC AI dashboard debriefing

Debriefing ready: 2026-04-26-1004 UTC

Standalone briefing page generated from the local PEEC AI dashboard repository plus available search tooling.

https://peec-ai-dashboard.vercel.app/debriefings/2026-04-26-1004/

Source status

Local repo updated from fork/main.

PEEC MCP/action-item runtime output was not discoverable in local files during this cron run.

Tavily web search returned 401 Unauthorized, so online market claims are limited to repository-grounded context.

Dashboard coverage

The app is a React/Express GoGeo dashboard powered by Peec AI, designed for project selection, brand reports, visibility, share of voice, sentiment, position, company pages, and chat assistant context.

Key metrics tracked

VisibilityShare of voiceSentimentPosition

Action items

  1. Restore MCP/action-item ingestion: make the cron environment expose recent Peec MCP outputs or export action items into a tracked/non-secret data folder before each run.
  2. Fix Tavily/search credentials: rotate or configure Tavily credentials so future debriefings can include current competitor and GEO/LLMO market signals.
  3. Publish a recurring snapshot data contract: generate a sanitized JSON artifact containing selected project, brands, metrics, anomalies, and recommended actions.
  4. Prioritize weak metric dimensions: use the dashboard’s visibility, share-of-voice, sentiment, and position metrics to identify pages/prompts where Peec AI can win AI-answer presence.
  5. Add citations to future briefings: require every recommendation to point to a local metric row, MCP action item, or retrieved URL.

Prioritized next steps

  • P0: confirm PEEC_API_KEY/PEEC_PROJECT_ID are available to the server-side proxy in production.
  • P1: add an automated export of brand report rows for cron-safe static analysis.
  • P1: add a latest debriefing link from the app shell or documentation.
  • P2: enrich company pages with generated answer-focused recommendations.

Links & citations

  • Repository README: GoGeo is a local React and Express dashboard powered by Peec AI.
  • README features: project selector, Peec brand reports, visibility/share-of-voice/sentiment/position dashboard, company pages, chat assistant.
  • Runtime note: Tavily search unavailable due 401 in this cron execution.
Generated at 2026-04-26 10:04 UTC. Assumption: absent MCP output means no new private action-item source was accessible, not that no action items exist.
